response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with strong TypeScript, system architecture, and leadership skills. He also possesses some recent, highly relevant exposure to AI agents and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling. However, he lacks the required 8+ years of dedicated AI-solution development, Python expertise, and explicit experience with vector databases and RAG architectures, making him a poor fit for this specialized GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with a strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and software craftsmanship.
Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and building scalable cloud architectures using AWS and Kubernetes.
Recent, highly relevant experience working with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
concerns: Significantly lacks the required minimum of 8 years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
No professional experience listed with Python, a critical language requirement for this GenAI role.
Missing explicit experience with vector databases and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
